auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Campaign Cleaner API key sent in the X-CC-API-Key header. Manage API keys from API Management in the Campaign Cleaner dashboard.

actions.name: delete_campaign
actions.description: Delete one saved Campaign Cleaner campaign by campaign ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for referencing one Campaign Cleaner campaign.

status.description: Whether Campaign Cleaner deleted the campaign successfully.

error.description: The upstream failure reason when the delete request is unsuccessful.

outputSchema.description: The delete result returned by Campaign Cleaner.

actions.name: get_campaign
actions.description: Retrieve the full Campaign Cleaner analysis payload for one saved campaign.

minimize_html.description: Whether the returned campaign HTML should be minimized.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Campaign Cleaner campaign.

campaign.description: The full Campaign Cleaner campaign analysis object.

outputSchema.description: The full campaign analysis returned by Campaign Cleaner.

actions.name: get_campaign_pdf_analysis
actions.description: Download a Campaign Cleaner PDF analysis report and return it as a transit file.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for referencing one Campaign Cleaner campaign.

fileId.description: The local transit file identifier for the PDF report.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit file download URL for the PDF report.

sizeBytes.description: The PDF report size in bytes.

name.description: The filename of the downloaded PDF report.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded PDF report.

content.description: The downloadable Campaign Cleaner PDF report.

outputSchema.description: The downloaded Campaign Cleaner PDF analysis report.

actions.name: get_campaign_status
actions.description: Fetch the current processing status of one submitted Campaign Cleaner campaign.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for referencing one Campaign Cleaner campaign.

status.description: The Campaign Cleaner campaign lifecycle status.

date_added.description: The timestamp when the campaign was saved or submitted.

outputSchema.description: The current processing status returned by Campaign Cleaner.

actions.name: get_credits
actions.description: Get the remaining Campaign Cleaner credits available to the current API key.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

actions.name: list_campaigns
actions.description: List saved Campaign Cleaner campaigns together with their current processing status.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

status.description: The Campaign Cleaner campaign lifecycle status.

date_added.description: The timestamp when the campaign was saved or submitted.

campaigns.description: The saved campaigns visible to the current API key.

outputSchema.description: The list of saved Campaign Cleaner campaigns.

actions.name: send_campaign
actions.description: Submit an email campaign HTML payload for Campaign Cleaner analysis and processing.

campaign_html.description: The full HTML content of the email campaign.

campaign_name.description: The saved name of the email campaign.

adjust_font_colors.description: Whether Campaign Cleaner should normalize spam-triggering font colors.

adjust_font_size.description: Whether Campaign Cleaner should enforce the configured font size bounds.

convert_h_to_p_tags.description: Whether header tags should be converted into paragraph tags.

custom_info.description: Custom caller metadata returned later by get_campaign.

host_extensionless_images.description: Whether extensionless images should be hosted when resize-and-host is enabled.

inline_css.description: Whether CSS should be inlined into each HTML element.

inline_css_important.description: Whether inlined CSS should include the !important flag.

media_queries_important.description: Whether media query rules should be marked as !important.

image_max_width.description: The maximum width in pixels applied to all images.

min_font_size_allowed.description: The minimum allowed font size in pixels.

max_font_size_allowed.description: The maximum allowed font size in pixels.

preserve_media_queries.description: Whether media queries should be preserved in the returned HTML.

relative_links_base_url.description: The absolute base URL used to expand relative links in the campaign.

remove_classes_and_ids.description: Whether class and ID attributes should be removed after CSS inlining.

remove_comments.description: Whether HTML and CSS comments should be removed.

remove_control_non_printable.description: Whether control and non-printable characters should be removed.

remove_css_inheritance.description: Whether inherited CSS should be removed after inlining.

remove_image_height.description: Whether fixed image heights should be removed.

remove_successive_punctuation.description: Whether repeated punctuation should be collapsed to a single character.

replace_diacritics.description: Whether diacritic characters should be replaced with ASCII equivalents.

replace_non_ascii_characters.description: Whether non-ASCII characters should be replaced with ASCII equivalents.

resize_and_host.description: Whether eligible images should be resized, converted, and hosted by Campaign Cleaner.

max_width.description: The surrounding div max width in pixels.

text_align.description: The text alignment applied inside the surrounding div.

font_size.description: The default surrounding div font size in pixels.

center_to_parent.description: Whether the surrounding div should be centered within its parent.

surrounding_div.description: Optional surrounding div settings applied to the submitted campaign.

webhook_url.description: An absolute webhook URL that receives the finished campaign analysis.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for submitting a campaign to Campaign Cleaner.

outputSchema.description: The output payload returned after submitting a campaign.
